Glorify the name of your Lord, the Most High,Footnote-1
Who created all things and fashioned them in good proportion;Footnote-2
and then made it into a blackish straw.Footnote-6
We shall make you recite and then you will not forget,Footnote-7
except what Allah should wish.Footnote-8 He knows all that is manifest and all that is hidden.Footnote-9
We shall ease you to follow the way of Ease.
So render good counsel if good counsel will avail.Footnote-10
He who fears (Allah) shall heed it,Footnote-11
but the wretched will turn away from it.
He will be cast into the Great Fire.
Then he will neither die in it, nor live.Footnote-12
He who purified himself shall prosper,Footnote-13
remembering his Lord's nameFootnote-14 and praying.Footnote-15
No; but you prefer the present life,Footnote-16
whereas the Hereafter is better and more enduring.Footnote-17
This, indeed, was in the ancient Scrolls,
the Scrolls of Abraham and Moses.Footnote-18
